title: evota harveyana
intro: Evota harveyana, also known as the Evodia tree or Evodia rutaecarpa, is a plant species native to East Asia, particularly in China, Japan, and Korea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Evoda harveyana include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Evoda harveyana include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
